front: What is the evolution of peptide drug approval?
back: Peptide drug approvals: 1922: Insulin (first peptide drug). 1985: Calcitonin. 1996: Leuprolide (GnRH agonist). 2005: Exenatide (GLP-1 agonist). 2010s: Liraglutide, Semaglutide, Icatibant. 2020s: Oral semaglutide, tirzepatide (dual GIP/GLP-1). ~80 approved peptides, 500+ in clinical trials.
